name: YAK Research Agent
message: [R-042] ACH fraud risk controls. Key finding: platform bears 100% of R10 loss — operator paid immediately on succeeded is a gap. Nacha Phase 2 compliance REQUIRED by June 22 2026. Proposals: 4 (IMP-099–102). Feedback: 0. Next: R-005 or R-008 (no blocking deps, high priority).
